{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Senior Business Development Executive",
  "description": "Accretio Africa - Our client, is recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Business Development Executive

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Work Mode: Onsite

Job Summary


	Accretio Africa is recruiting on behalf of our partner for an experienced and commercially driven Senior Business Development Executive to drive growth, develop strategic partnerships, and expand market opportunities.


What You&rsquo;ll Do


	Identify and pursue new business opportunities across residential, commercial, and industrial sectors
	Build and maintain relationships with developers, architects, contractors, consultants, and key stakeholders
	Manage the full sales cycle from prospecting and proposal development to negotiation and deal closure
	Prepare commercial proposals, presentations, and revenue forecasts
	Collaborate with internal teams to ensure seamless project execution and client satisfaction


Who You Are


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Business Administration, Marketing, Engineering, or related field
	5&ndash;7 years of experience in Business Development or B2B Sales
	Demonstrated track record of meeting or exceeding revenue targets
	Strong negotiation, presentation, and stakeholder management skills
	Commercially minded and comfortable working in a fast-paced environment.


Why Join?


	Salary: N500,000 &ndash; N800,000 monthly
	Competitive compensation package
	Exposure to high-value projects and strategic clients
	Growth opportunities within a scaling business
	Collaborative and performance-driven environment
",

Senior Business Development Executive Job at Accretio Africa




        
    

        
        Accretio Africa - Our client, is recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Business Development Executive

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Work Mode: Onsite

Job Summary


	Accretio Africa is recruiting on behalf of our partner for an experienced and commercially driven Senior Business Development Executive to drive growth, develop strategic partnerships, and expand market opportunities.


What You’ll Do
     

            
    




	Identify and pursue new business opportunities across residential, commercial, and industrial sectors
	Build and maintain relationships with developers, architects, contractors, consultants, and key stakeholders
	Manage the full sales cycle from prospecting and proposal development to negotiation and deal closure
	Prepare commercial proposals, presentations, and revenue forecasts
	Collaborate with internal teams to ensure seamless project execution and client satisfaction


Who You Are


	Bachelor’s Degree in Business Administration, Marketing, Engineering, or related field
	5–7 years of experience in Business Development or B2B Sales
	Demonstrated track record of meeting or exceeding revenue targets
	Strong negotiation, presentation, and stakeholder management skills
	Commercially minded and comfortable working in a fast-paced environment.


Why Join?


	Salary: N500,000 – N800,000 monthly
	Competitive compensation package
	Exposure to high-value projects and strategic clients
	Growth opportunities within a scaling business
	Collaborative and performance-driven environment
    

    

        Click here to Apply

Job Position: Admin Manager

Job Summary


	Our client urgently desire services of an Admin Manager.


The job responsibilities


	Overseeing and coordinating maritime operations, including vessel scheduling, navigation, and crew management
	Ensuring compliance with maritime laws, regulations, and international conventions
	Working with various stakeholders, including shipping companies, port authorities, and government bodies
	Managing maritime safety and environmental protection programs
	Conducting inspections and audits on vessels and maritime facilities
	Investigating maritime accidents and incidents, and preparing reports on findings
	Maintaining records and documentation related to maritime operations and compliance
	Providing advice and guidance on maritime matters to senior management and other stakeholders
	Developing and implementing policies and procedures to improve maritime operations and safety
	Coordinating and liaising with international maritime organizations and agencies.


Requirements


	A minimum of an HND or BSc in any relevant field.
	The ideal candidate must have a minimum of 5 years&rsquo; experience.
	A previous experience in the same role in the Marine Industry will be an advantage.
	Also having an experience with an Audit firm will be a further advantage.
	The ideal candidate must be resident within Delta State.


Method of Application&nbsp;

Admin Manager Job at Brilliant Performance Solutions Limited




        
    

        
        Brilliant Performance Solutions Limited - Our client is a key player in the Marine Industry and currently located at Efurun in Delta State is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Admin Manager

Job Location: Warri, Delta
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Our client urgently desire services of an Admin Manager.


The job responsibilities
     

            
    




	Overseeing and coordinating maritime operations, including vessel scheduling, navigation, and crew management
	Ensuring compliance with maritime laws, regulations, and international conventions
	Working with various stakeholders, including shipping companies, port authorities, and government bodies
	Managing maritime safety and environmental protection programs
	Conducting inspections and audits on vessels and maritime facilities
	Investigating maritime accidents and incidents, and preparing reports on findings
	Maintaining records and documentation related to maritime operations and compliance
	Providing advice and guidance on maritime matters to senior management and other stakeholders
	Developing and implementing policies and procedures to improve maritime operations and safety
	Coordinating and liaising with international maritime organizations and agencies.


Requirements


	A minimum of an HND or BSc in any relevant field.
	The ideal candidate must have a minimum of 5 years’ experience.
	A previous experience in the same role in the Marine Industry will be an advantage.
	Also having an experience with an Audit firm will be a further advantage.
	The ideal candidate must be resident within Delta State.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: [email protected] or [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Transport Officer / Driver",
  "description": "Pastures Hub Nigeria Limited is a food distribution and supply company focused on improving how fresh produce and food supplies reach businesses and consumers in Nigeria. The company provides structured supply solutions to restaurants, quick-service restaurants (QSRs), catering companies, hotels, schools, and retail customers through an efficient distribution network and a growing e-commerce platform with subscription options.

Driven by a mission to empower food establishments with innovative supply chain solutions, personalized service, and sustainable sourcing practices, Pastures Hub leverages technology to deliver reliability, transparency, and consistent quality.The company operates with a strong culture built on agility, customer-centric service, and trust, positioning it to play a key role in transforming Nigeria&rsquo;s food supply chain.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Transport Officer / Driver

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Position Summary


	The Transport Officer plays a key role in ensuring the safe, timely, and efficient movement of goods, staff, and materials.
	This role goes beyond driving. It also involves route planning, logistics coordination, and transport sourcing when needed.
	The ideal candidate is proactive, detail-oriented, and comfortable using basic digital tools for communication and reporting.


Key Responsibilities


	Safely operate company vehicles for the transportation of goods, staff, and materials
	Plan efficient routes based on delivery schedules, road conditions, and cost considerations
	Coordinate with the supply chain team to adjust transport plans as needed
	Ensure proper loading, securing, and unloading of items in line with safety standards
	Conduct routine vehicle inspections and report maintenance needs promptly
	Track and document trips, fuel usage, mileage, and incidents accurately
	Source and coordinate third - party transport providers when company vehicles are unavailable
	Maintain clear communication using tools such as Google Maps, WhatsApp, and email for tracking and updates.


Required Qualifications and Skills


	Minimum of WAEC / SSCE or OND qualification.
	1 &ndash; 3 years of relevant experience in driving, logistics, or transport coordination.
	Valid Nigerian driver&rsquo;s license with a clean driving record.
	Ability to use smartphones and basic digital tools for communication and reporting.
	Strong attention to detail and record - keeping skills.
	Good communication and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team.


Preferred Qualifications:


	Experience working in a supply chain, logistics, or distribution environment.
	Familiarity with vendor sourcing or third - party transport coordination.
	Basic mechanical knowledge of vehicles.


Key Competencies:


	Great professional driving skills.
	Familiarity with Vehicle maintenance.
	Effective communication.
	Reliable, punctual and respectful.
	Capable of working under pressure.
	Time management.
	Physically and medically fit.


Salary and Benefits


	N100,000 - N120,000 / month.
	A structured and supportive work environment.
	Opportunities to grow within operations and supply chain functions.
	Exposure to logistics coordination and operational systems.
	Competitive compensation aligned with experience.
	A workplace that values safety, efficiency, and teamwork.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: hr@pastures.com.ng using &quot;Transport Officer (Lagos)&quot; as the subject of the mail.",

Transport Officer / Driver Job at Pastures Hub Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        Pastures Hub Nigeria Limited is a food distribution and supply company focused on improving how fresh produce and food supplies reach businesses and consumers in Nigeria. The company provides structured supply solutions to restaurants, quick-service restaurants (QSRs), catering companies, hotels, schools, and retail customers through an efficient distribution network and a growing e-commerce platform with subscription options.
     

            
    



Driven by a mission to empower food establishments with innovative supply chain solutions, personalized service, and sustainable sourcing practices, Pastures Hub leverages technology to deliver reliability, transparency, and consistent quality.The company operates with a strong culture built on agility, customer-centric service, and trust, positioning it to play a key role in transforming Nigeria’s food supply chain.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Transport Officer / Driver

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Position Summary


	The Transport Officer plays a key role in ensuring the safe, timely, and efficient movement of goods, staff, and materials.
	This role goes beyond driving. It also involves route planning, logistics coordination, and transport sourcing when needed.
	The ideal candidate is proactive, detail-oriented, and comfortable using basic digital tools for communication and reporting.


Key Responsibilities


	Safely operate company vehicles for the transportation of goods, staff, and materials
	Plan efficient routes based on delivery schedules, road conditions, and cost considerations
	Coordinate with the supply chain team to adjust transport plans as needed
	Ensure proper loading, securing, and unloading of items in line with safety standards
	Conduct routine vehicle inspections and report maintenance needs promptly
	Track and document trips, fuel usage, mileage, and incidents accurately
	Source and coordinate third - party transport providers when company vehicles are unavailable
	Maintain clear communication using tools such as Google Maps, WhatsApp, and email for tracking and updates.


Required Qualifications and Skills


	Minimum of WAEC / SSCE or OND qualification.
	1 – 3 years of relevant experience in driving, logistics, or transport coordination.
	Valid Nigerian driver’s license with a clean driving record.
	Ability to use smartphones and basic digital tools for communication and reporting.
	Strong attention to detail and record - keeping skills.
	Good communication and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team.


Preferred Qualifications:


	Experience working in a supply chain, logistics, or distribution environment.
	Familiarity with vendor sourcing or third - party transport coordination.
	Basic mechanical knowledge of vehicles.


Key Competencies:


	Great professional driving skills.
	Familiarity with Vehicle maintenance.
	Effective communication.
	Reliable, punctual and respectful.
	Capable of working under pressure.
	Time management.
	Physically and medically fit.


Salary and Benefits


	N100,000 - N120,000 / month.
	A structured and supportive work environment.
	Opportunities to grow within operations and supply chain functions.
	Exposure to logistics coordination and operational systems.
	Competitive compensation aligned with experience.
	A workplace that values safety, efficiency, and teamwork.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Transport Officer (Lagos)" as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

We are committed to building an organization with world-class skills and management capability to achieve the Company&rsquo;s vision.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Marketer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	The ideal candidate will be responsible for driving digital marketing, social media growth, content creation, public relations, and brand awareness across the Group and its subsidiaries.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and execute digital marketing strategies
	Manage social media growth and audience engagement
	Create compelling content (articles, graphics, videos, reels)
	Support PR, media engagement, and brand reputation management
	Track campaign performance and provide data-driven insights


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Marketing, Communications, or related field
	2 - 4 years of relevant experience
	Strong knowledge of SEO, SEM, paid ads, analytics, and automation tools
	Excellent writing, storytelling, graphics, and video editing skills
	Strong PR/media relations and analytical skills.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: careers@pathway.ng using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Digital Marketer Job at Pathway Advisors Limited




        
    

        
        Pathway Advisors Limited is a boutique investment banking firm that aims at integrating superior values of trust and honesty while providing exceptional Investment Banking services to identified clients which includes financial institutions, corporations and high-net-worth individuals. Our Vision is “To be the most respected Investment Banking Firm in Nigeria”. We are committed to building an organization with world-class skills and management capability to achieve the Company’s vision.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Marketer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

            
    




	The ideal candidate will be responsible for driving digital marketing, social media growth, content creation, public relations, and brand awareness across the Group and its subsidiaries.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and execute digital marketing strategies
	Manage social media growth and audience engagement
	Create compelling content (articles, graphics, videos, reels)
	Support PR, media engagement, and brand reputation management
	Track campaign performance and provide data-driven insights


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Marketing, Communications, or related field
	2 - 4 years of relevant experience
	Strong knowledge of SEO, SEM, paid ads, analytics, and automation tools
	Excellent writing, storytelling, graphics, and video editing skills
	Strong PR/media relations and analytical skills.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply
